sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّاسُ يَسْتَمِعُونَ إِلَى الْمُوسِيقَى فِي الأَعْيَادِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su slušali muziku na praznicima.
sentences.translationEn: People used to listen to music during festivals.

sentences.arabic: عَزَفَ الْمُوسِيقَارُ عَلَى آلَةٍ مَصْنُوعَةٍ مِنَ الْخَشَبِ.
sentences.translation: Muzičar je svirao na instrumentu od drveta.
sentences.translationEn: The musician played an instrument made of wood.

sentences.translation: Djeca su plesala i odrasli su zajedno pjevali.
sentences.translationEn: The children danced and the adults sang together.

sentences.translation: Praznici su bili vrijeme radosti i okupljanja.
sentences.translationEn: Festivals were a time for joy and gathering.
